Skill.intro: Technical skills applied in my projects, covering front‑end development and UI/UX design.

project.detail-projet-agence-digital: An elegant showcase for a digital agency. Web creation, marketing and SEO services, minimalist design, client testimonials, and highlighted expertise to strengthen credibility and attract new partners.
project.detail-projet-electricien-julien: Conversion-focused landing page for an electrician. Highlights services, coverage areas and a clear call-to-action to generate quote requests.
project.detail-boutique-alpha-fitness: A dynamic showcase website presenting essential sports equipment. Modern design, highlighted key products, clear advantages, and smooth navigation to inspire trust and encourage purchases.
project.detail-projet-landing-plombier: Professional landing page for a plumber. Built for local SEO and fast contact, with a clear display of contact information.

contact.phrase: Let’s talk about your ideas! Whether it’s a project, a collaboration, or just a casual exchange, I’d be delighted to hear from you.
